positive: A minimalist and aesthetically pleasing illustration of a stylized mountain range and rising sun silhouette against a vivid gradient sky. The mountains should feature sharp, geometric peaks, rendered in deep indigo and teal tones. The sun is depicted as a clean, radiating circular burst of warm gold and orange. The composition is centered, emphasizing the contrast between the solid, dark foreground silhouette and the bright, ethereal background. Use a clean vector art style with sharp lines and flat color application, perfect for screen printing or apparel transfer. High contrast, clean edges, breathable negative space.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, logo, watermark, writing, cluttered, busy background, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, photorealistic, 3d render
